name: FullStory
description: FullStory is a digital experience intelligence platform. Capture user sessions, analyze behavior with heatmaps and funnels, and identify UX issues with frustration signals and error tracking.

capabilities.name: search_sessions
capabilities.description: Search for user sessions matching specific criteria and behavior patterns.

capabilities.name: get_session_details
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a specific user session.

capabilities.name: create_segment
capabilities.description: Create a user segment based on behavioral criteria.

capabilities.name: set_user_properties
capabilities.description: Set custom properties on a user for segmentation and analysis.

capabilities.name: track_event
capabilities.description: Send a custom server-side event for a user.

capabilities.name: get_events
capabilities.description: Retrieve events for a specific user or session.
